content:
Hi !
For now my bets D-Effect zone score is 360 and i would like to pump up a bit this score !
I am not sure on how to manage my support or wheels and i would like some helps for team ideas !

Mu currnet ones are :
Xu Aigis Mouchette (E0) GHelot
Ramona Hameln Caecus Tawil
Miryam Tulu Goliath GMurphy
Thais Winkle Horla Doresain
Arachne Erica Castor Agrippa
This is who I have right now. Should I be using the moonless guide thing, and if so who should I put as the 4 units, or should I pull for sayas wheel card? Or just save for now?
Cheri’s guide has good insight for Moonless.

Please be sure to check out our <#1304022827824844842>  section! Here are a few resources, tips, and walkthroughs to help you master the game:
## General Guide
- [Morimens New Players Handbook](<https://docs.google.com/document/d/1THjxR9hHs4NWHqSWHHa2dHAGuE_cRGelfzXdBfCnIlM/edit?usp=sharing>) by Cheri
- [Game Mechanics](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1511362816362283118) by Mythag University
- [Store Guide](https://discordapp.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1442292634575175710) by Mythag University 
- [Morimens Database and Teambuiler](https://skeydb.com/#/database) by Fjant
## Mode Specific
- [P-Dive Shortest Map Analysis](<https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1483756178340315216>) by Aurora
## Compendium
- [Morimens Compendium](<https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1TCU7LJRzqKeuvLe97y_TfGZ-j6jq5bZX6hskAAJ2mFQ/edit?gid=167686509#gid=167686509>) by Mythag University
- [Boss Compendium](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1489244885025292328) by Mythag University

Most players recommend Horla/Thais as these are some of the best supports in the game; besides the aforementioned two, the last Astral Reign characters can be your choice, but there are some specific ones that are considered strong.

Thanks for all the advice, did some farming and managed to clear arc1 with this setup! But had to burn 1 E.gnosis for final arc1 boss 😆 

Going into arc2, could I get some advice on what wheels would be best to tackle? 
Should I just look to replace the low rarity wheels with SR keyflare mainstat wheels?

Still working on getting them skill levels up to level 3
